en: After he had finished all his sayings in the hearing of the people, he entered Capernaum.
zh: 耶穌向群眾講完這一切話，就進了迦百農。

en: Now a centurion had a servant who was sick and at the point of death, who was highly valued by him.
zh: 有百夫長所重用的一個奴僕，病得快要死了。

en: When the centurion heard about Jesus, he sent to him elders of the Jews, asking him to come and heal his servant.
zh: 百夫長聽見耶穌的事，就打發猶太人中幾個長老到他那裡，求他去醫治他的奴僕。

en: And when they came to Jesus, they pleaded with him earnestly, saying, "He is worthy to have you do this for him,
zh: 長老們就來見耶穌，懇切地求他說：“你給他行這事，是他配得的，

en: for he loves our nation, and he is the one who built us our synagogue."
zh: 因為他愛我們的人民，給我們建造會堂。”

en: And Jesus went with them. When he was not far from the house, the centurion sent friends, saying to him, "Lord, do not trouble yourself, for I am not worthy to have you come under my roof.
zh: 耶穌就和他們同去。離那家不遠的時候，百夫長派幾個朋友來說：“主啊，不必勞駕，因為你到舍下來，我實在不敢當，

en: Therefore I did not presume to come to you. But say the word, and let my servant be healed.
zh: 我也覺得沒有資格去見你；只要你說一句話，我的僕人就必好了。

en: For I too am a man set under authority, with soldiers under me: and I say to one, 'Go,' and he goes; and to another, 'Come,' and he comes; and to my servant, 'Do this,' and he does it."
zh: 因為我自己是在別人的權下，也有兵在我以下；我對這個說：‘去！’他就去；對另一個說：‘來！’他就來；對我的僕人說：‘作這個！’他就作。”

en: When Jesus heard these things, he marveled at him, and turning to the crowd that followed him, said, "I tell you, not even in Israel have I found such faith."
zh: 耶穌聽見這些話，就很驚奇，轉身對跟隨的眾人說：“我告訴你們，這樣的信心，我在以色列中從來沒有見過。”

en: And when those who had been sent returned to the house, they found the servant well.
zh: 奉派的人回到家裡，見那奴僕已經好了。

en: Soon afterward he went to a town called Nain, and his disciples and a great crowd went with him.
zh: 後來耶穌往拿因城去，與他同去的有門徒和一大群人。

en: As he drew near to the gate of the town, behold, a man who had died was being carried out, the only son of his mother, and she was a widow, and a considerable crowd from the town was with her.
zh: 他走近城門的時候，有人把一個死人抬出來，是個獨生子，他母親又是個寡婦。城裡有一大群人陪著她。

en: And when the Lord saw her, he had compassion on her and said to her, "Do not weep."
zh: 主看見了，就憐憫她，對她說：“不要哭！”

en: Then he came up and touched the bier, and the bearers stood still. And he said, "Young man, I say to you, arise."
zh: 於是上前按著槓子，抬的人就站住。他說：“青年人，我吩咐你起來！”

en: And the dead man sat up and began to speak, and Jesus gave him to his mother.
zh: 那死人就坐起來，開口說話，耶穌就把他交給他母親。

en: Fear seized them all, and they glorified God, saying, "A great prophet has arisen among us!" and "God has visited his people!"
zh: 眾人都驚懼，頌讚 神說：“有偉大的先知在我們中間興起來了！”又說：“ 神眷顧他的子民了！”

en: And this report about him spread through the whole of Judea and all the surrounding country.
zh: 於是這話傳遍了猶太和周圍各地。

en: The disciples of John reported all these things to him. And John,
zh: 約翰的門徒把這一切事告訴約翰。他就叫了兩個門徒，

en: calling two of his disciples to him, sent them to the Lord, saying, "Are you the one who is to come, or shall we look for another?"
zh: 差他們往主那裡去，說：“你就是那位要來的，還是我們要等別人呢？”

en: And when the men had come to him, they said, "John the Baptist has sent us to you, saying, 'Are you the one who is to come, or shall we look for another?'"
zh: 兩人來到耶穌跟前，說：“施洗的約翰差我們來問你：‘你就是那位要來的，還是我們要等別人呢？’”

en: In that hour he healed many people of diseases and plagues and evil spirits, and on many who were blind he bestowed sight.
zh: 就在那時候，耶穌治好許多患疾病的、遭災難的、身上有污鬼附著的，並且施恩給瞎眼的，使他們看見。

en: And he answered them, "Go and tell John what you have seen and heard: the blind receive their sight, the lame walk, lepers are cleansed, and the deaf hear, the dead are raised up, the poor have good news preached to them.
zh: 耶穌回答他們：“你們回去，把看見和聽見的都告訴約翰，就是瞎的可以看見，跛的可以走路，患痲風的得到潔淨，聾的可以聽見，死人復活，窮人有福音聽。

en: And blessed is the one who is not offended by me."
zh: 那不被我絆倒的，就有福了。”

en: When John's messengers had gone, Jesus began to speak to the crowds concerning John: "What did you go out into the wilderness to see? A reed shaken by the wind?
zh: 約翰差來的人走了以後，耶穌對群眾講起約翰來，說：“你們到曠野去，是要看甚麼？被風吹動的蘆葦嗎？

en: What then did you go out to see? A man dressed in soft clothing? Behold, those who are dressed in splendid clothing and live in luxury are in kings' courts.
zh: 你們出去到底要看甚麼？身穿華麗衣服的人嗎？這些衣服華麗，生活奢侈的人，是在王宮裡的。

en: What then did you go out to see? A prophet? Yes, I tell you, and more than a prophet.
zh: 那麼，你們出去要看甚麼？先知嗎？我告訴你們，是的。他比先知重要得多了。

en: This is he of whom it is written, "' Behold, I send my messenger before your face, who will prepare your way before you.'
zh: 聖經所記： ‘看哪，我差遣我的使者在你面前， 他必在你前頭預備你的道路’， 這句話是指著他說的。

en: I tell you, among those born of women none is greater than John. Yet the one who is least in the kingdom of God is greater than he."
zh: 我告訴你們，婦人所生的，沒有一個比約翰更大，然而在 神的國裡最小的比他還大。”

en: (When all the people heard this, and the tax collectors too, they declared God just, having been baptized with the baptism of John,
zh: 眾人和稅吏受過約翰的洗禮，聽見這話，就稱 神為義。

en: but the Pharisees and the lawyers rejected the purpose of God for themselves, not having been baptized by him.)
zh: 但法利賽人和律法師，未受過約翰的洗禮，就拒絕 神對他們的美意。

en: "To what then shall I compare the people of this generation, and what are they like?
zh: 耶穌又說：“我要把這世代的人比作甚麼呢？他們好像甚麼呢？

en: They are like children sitting in the marketplace and calling to one another, "' We played the flute for you, and you did not dance; we sang a dirge, and you did not weep.'
zh: 他們好像小孩子坐在巿中心，彼此呼叫，說： ‘我們給你們吹笛子，你們卻不跳舞； 我們唱哀歌，你們也不啼哭。’

en: For John the Baptist has come eating no bread and drinking no wine, and you say, 'He has a demon.'
zh: 因為施洗的約翰來了，不吃飯，不喝酒，你們說他是鬼附的。

en: The Son of Man has come eating and drinking, and you say, 'Look at him! A glutton and a drunkard, a friend of tax collectors and sinners!'
zh: 人子來了，又吃又喝，你們說：‘你看，這人貪食好酒，與稅吏和罪人為友。’

en: Yet wisdom is justified by all her children."
zh: 但 神的智慧，藉著他的兒女就證實是公義的了。”

en: One of the Pharisees asked him to eat with him, and he went into the Pharisee's house and took his place at the table.
zh: 有一個法利賽人，請耶穌同他吃飯，他就到法利賽人家去赴席。

en: And behold, a woman of the city, who was a sinner, when she learned that he was reclining at table in the Pharisee's house, brought an alabaster flask of ointment,
zh: 那城裡有一個女人，是個罪人，知道他在法利賽人家裡吃飯，就拿著一瓶香膏，

en: and standing behind him at his feet, weeping, she began to wet his feet with her tears and wiped them with the hair of her head and kissed his feet and anointed them with the ointment.
zh: 站在耶穌背後，挨近他的腳哭，眼淚滴濕他的腳，又用自己的頭髮擦乾，不住地吻他的腳，並且抹上香膏。

en: Now when the Pharisee who had invited him saw this, he said to himself, "If this man were a prophet, he would have known who and what sort of woman this is who is touching him, for she is a sinner."
zh: 請他的法利賽人看見了，心裡說：“這人若是先知，必定知道摸他的是誰，是怎樣的女人，因為她是個罪人！”

en: And Jesus answering said to him, "Simon, I have something to say to you." And he answered, "Say it, Teacher."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“西門，我有句話要對你說。”他說：“老師，請說。”

en: "A certain moneylender had two debtors. One owed five hundred denarii, and the other fifty.
zh: 耶穌說：“一個債主有兩個債戶，一個欠五百銀幣，一個欠五十。

en: When they could not pay, he cancelled the debt of both. Now which of them will love him more?"
zh: 他們都無力償還，債主就把兩人豁免了。他們之中哪一個更愛他呢？”

en: Simon answered, "The one, I suppose, for whom he cancelled the larger debt." And he said to him, "You have judged rightly."
zh: 西門回答：“我想是那個多得恩免的。”耶穌說：“你判斷對了。”

en: Then turning toward the woman he said to Simon, "Do you see this woman? I entered your house; you gave me no water for my feet, but she has wet my feet with her tears and wiped them with her hair.
zh: 於是轉身向著那女人，對西門說：“你看見這女人嗎？我進了你的家，你沒有給我水洗腳，但這女人用眼淚濕了我的腳，用頭髮擦乾。

en: You gave me no kiss, but from the time I came in she has not ceased to kiss my feet.
zh: 你沒有和我親吻；但這女人，自從我進來，就不住地親我的腳。

en: You did not anoint my head with oil, but she has anointed my feet with ointment.
zh: 你沒有用油抹我的頭；但這女人用香膏抹我的腳。

en: Therefore I tell you, her sins, which are many, are forgiven- for she loved much. But he who is forgiven little, loves little."
zh: 所以我告訴你，她許多罪都蒙赦免了，因為她的愛多；那赦免少的，愛就少。”

en: And he said to her, "Your sins are forgiven."
zh: 耶穌就對她說：“你的罪赦免了。”

en: Then those who were at table with him began to say among themselves, "Who is this, who even forgives sins?"
zh: 跟他一起吃飯的人心裡說：“這是誰，竟然赦罪呢？”

en: And he said to the woman, "Your faith has saved you; go in peace."
zh: 耶穌對那女人說：“你的信救了你，平安地去吧！”
